yells.engage: You wake the mountain? Then be buried by it!
yells.summon: Rise, stormlings! Tear them loose from my slopes!
yells.enrage: The peak breaks, and the sky falls with it!

lines: THUNDER ANSWERS! The peak has teeth again!
Run, little climbers! The mountain runs faster!
Every stone remembers your name, and none forgive!
I am the storm the summit swallowed!

ysolei.name: Ysolei, Avatar of the Drowned Moon
